questions.q: Which Roald Dahl book features a boy who finds a Golden Ticket to tour a chocolate factory?

What was Roald Dahl's last children's book published during his lifetime?
Who did young George make his marvelous medicine for in 'George's Marvelous Medicine'?

What does Mr. Twit hide in the spaghetti he serves to Mrs. Twit?

Roald Dahl wrote screenplays for which spy film, in addition to children's stories?
Roald Dahl's adult fiction is often cited for which short-story collection?

choices: Danny (Danny, the Champion of the World)

questions.q: In which Royal Air Force squadron did Roald Dahl serve as a fighter pilot during World War II?
What was the name of Roald Dahl's writing hut, which he constructed in his garden at Gipsy House?
Which American actress, known for her Oscar-winning roles, was married to Roald Dahl from 1953 to 1983?
What accident in 1962 resulted in the death of one of Roald Dahl's children, profoundly affecting his personal life?
choices: A bicycle accident while riding to school
A pram being struck by a taxi while crossing the street
A fall from a playground structure

questions.q: Before 'The Enormous Crocodile', which illustrated book was Quentin Blake's first collaboration with Roald Dahl?
choices: Danny the Champion of the World

questions.q: Which Roald Dahl novel features a character named Earthworm, Centipede, and Spider as companions?

In 'The Witches', what is the Grand High Witch's true appearance under her gloves?
choices: Extremely long, pointed nails with no palms

questions.q: Which short story collection, published in 1960, features tales such as 'The Landlady' and 'Lamb to the Slaughter'?

choices: The Giraffe and the Pelly and Me

questions.q: What is the name of the orphanage from which the BFG abducts Sophie?

choices: Using raisins to feed sleeping pills to pheasants

questions.q: Roald Dahl's daughter Theo was severely injured in a carriage accident in which year, an event that deeply influenced his writing?

Roald Dahl's memoir of his early life is titled what?
What does George give his cantankerous Grandma in 'George's Marvellous Medicine'?
choices: A homemade potion of household items

Which illustrator collaborated with Roald Dahl on 'The Enormous Crocodile' as their first project together?

choices: She is a teacher and headmistress
She is a retired athlete and headmistress
She is a governess and school secretary
She is a coach and school principal
